lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on either the interior or exterior. It has been maintained in its original state.
Mint condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It has some mechanical wear and minor cosmetic issues. The exterior has some scratches and small dents, and the interior shows signs of use.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver. While it shows its age with some noticeable cosmetic wear on the exterior and minor staining on the interior upholstery, it remains mechanically sound for routine travel. There is a small, slow oil leak that requires periodic monitoring, and the air conditioning is functional but takes a moment to cool down. The engine starts reliably and the transmission shifts consistently. It is a solid, functional option for anyone seeking budget-friendly transportation without expecting a showroom appearance.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This car is a fantastic 'diamond in the rough' for anyone looking for a rewarding restoration project. While it needs significant mechanical and cosmetic TLC to get back to its prime, it offers an incredibly affordable entry point for your next automotive adventure. Grab this budget-friendly opportunity and make it your own!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of regular use over the years. Mechanically, the car is operational and runs, but it will likely need some upcoming maintenance, such as new brake pads and a suspension tune-up, to ensure long-term reliability. The exterior features several noticeable scratches, minor dings, and some sun-fading on the roof and hood. Inside, the cabin is intact but the upholstery shows wear and some light staining. While it isn't perfect, it remains a functional vehicle for someone willing to put in a bit of work.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit demonstrates consistent performance and reflects a standard of care that ensures long-term reliability. A definitive choice for the discerning driver, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience and represents a high-value acquisition within its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and I think you’re going to absolutely love it! It’s in solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out on a weekend road trip, it’s ready to go and looks great parked in the driveway. I've taken good care of it, and it's just waiting for a new home. Come take it for a spin—I’m sure you’ll be as happy with it as I’ve been!

Available is a mechanically sound 2017 BMW M2 (F87) featuring the N55 inline-six engine with TwinPower turbocharging, producing a robust 365 hp and 369 lb-ft of torque during overboost. This driver-focused example utilizes a 6-speed manual transmission with rev-matching technology, feeding power through an Active M Differential for precise torque vectoring. Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well. Clean title.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and style, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior retains a vibrant finish with only minor signs of road use consistent with its age, while the interior remains exceptionally clean, odor-free, and comfortable. Every feature, from the responsive climate control to the intuitive infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. It offers a smooth, quiet ride and responsive handling that makes it a joy to drive daily. This is a well-cared-for example, perfect for a discerning buyer seeking a dependable and high-quality pre-owned vehicle that is ready for the road.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic discipline. This selection offers a refined driving experience, characterized by consistent performance and a well-preserved interior. A premier choice for those seeking a balance of sophistication and proven reliability, this motorcar is prepared for immediate delivery to its next discerning owner.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance and driver satisfaction. Featuring a suite of premium amenities and a proven service history, it represents a sophisticated acquisition for the discerning motorist. We invite you to experience the refined handling and reliable engineering that define this exceptional offering.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute favorite ride, and it's looking for a new home! It's in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend getaways. It runs smoothly, feels great on the road, and has been well-loved and taken care of. If you're looking for a solid, dependable car that’s ready to go, you’ve found it! I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to have a blast with it. Come check it out!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry featuring Bilstein B16 dampers. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers precise throws, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Maintenance is current, including a recent VANOS service and valve adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates within factory tolerances. This is a driver-focused example that balances mechanical purity with daily usability.
Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a well-maintained balance of performance and reliability, perfect for a discerning driver who values mechanical integrity. The exterior paint maintains a high gloss and deep finish, showing only the minor, honest road peppering and light surface marks consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery remains firm and supportive, with only slight softening on the driver’s side bolster. Every feature, from the intuitive infotainment system to the heated power seats and dual-zone climate control, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a strict regimen of synthetic oil changes and recent preventative maintenance, including new brake pads and a fresh set of tires. The transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a confident and engaging driving experience. Included with the sale are complete service records, the original owner's manual, and two sets of keys. This is a solid, dependable car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating a consistent history of care and mechanical integrity, this unit offers a refined driving experience and superior aesthetic appeal. It stands as a testament to quality engineering, ensuring both reliability and prestige for its next owner.

Offering a sophisticated driving experience, it remains a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking quality without compromise.

It’s super clean, drives like a dream, and is ready for its next big adventure. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it just as much as I have. Let's get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

All scheduled maintenance is up to date, including a recent fluid service and brake inspection. This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering high-revving performance through six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure Double VANOS system. Power is managed by a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and delivered to the rear wheels via a speed-sensitive M-Variable differential lock. This example has been meticulously maintained with documented rod bearing replacement and subframe reinforcement—essential for the chassis integrity of this platform
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance. Inspect in person.

Up for sale is a well-maintained, reliable vehicle that strikes an excellent balance between performance and comfort. The exterior boasts a glossy finish with only minor cosmetic blemishes typical of careful road use, and the body panels are straight and free of major dents. Inside, you'll find a clean, smoke-free cabin featuring premium upholstery that has been preserved with care; the seats are supportive and the electronics, including the navigation and dual-zone climate control, are fully operational. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and has been serviced at regular intervals, with a comprehensive maintenance log available for review. The tires have significant tread remaining on the alloy wheels, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This car has spent the majority of its life garage-kept, which is evident in the preserved condition of the trim and rubber seals. It is a solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking a quality pre-owned vehicle that is ready for the road today.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, balancing robust mechanical performance with a sophisticated aesthetic. Demonstrating consistent care and structural integrity, this model serves as a premier choice for those seeking reliability and distinction. We invite you to inspect this well-appointed example, which stands as a testament to enduring quality and professional preservation.
